description: Part 9/10: Add the main processing loop - setup evaluation (S1-S4, INTRA conditions), negation detection, Last Valid Info tracking, and display text generation.
steps: Implement the main per-TF processing loop that populates forming/retesting arrays for entry/scalp/intra
Implement S1-S4 base setup evaluation logic for both bear and bull
Implement INTRA condition evaluation (EST retest, EM forming, LV aligned, Negation, Zone)
Implement intra negation detection logic (checking counter-direction EM patterns in INTRA TFs)
Implement Last Valid Info tracking (CheckBreak, ResolveLastValid functions)
Implement setup display text generation (bear_setup_display, bull_setup_display)
Implement Final Entry condition evaluation (all 6 conditions for bear/bull)
Implement the array reset loop at end of each tick
Commit and push with message 'feat: STX Edge MT5 Part 9/10 - Main processing loop and setup evaluation'
acceptance_criteria: S1-S4 setup conditions evaluate correctly matching Pine Script logic
INTRA conditions properly check all sub-conditions
Negation detection works for counter-direction patterns
Final Entry triggers when all conditions align
All state arrays are properly reset at end of tick
verification: Read the main loop and compare logic flow to Pine Script
findings: Implemented as part of complete single-file rewrite in FEAT-006.
